content.text: is the maximum number of tokens Claude can generate in a single response.
This limits how long your answer can be (e.g., a very long report, a multi-page document, or a large code file).
API configuration if you’re using the Claude API
For most everyday tasks, the default limits are sufficient. For very long outputs (e.g., generating a full book chapter or a large codebase), you may need to:
Adjust request parameters via the API
Exact numbers vary and are typically documented in Anthropic’s API docs rather than in the feature overview pages.
